title: Vince Kaminski
compiled_truth: Vince Kaminski is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2002-01-29), Vince Kaminski sent 7474 and received 2549 emails, totalling 10023 interactions. Top correspondents: [Vkaminski](people/vkaminski-aol) (2495), [Shirley Crenshaw](people/shirley-crenshaw) (1110), [Stinson Gibner](people/stinson-gibner) (520), [Vasant Shanbhogue](people/vasant-shanbhogue) (226), [Mike Roberts](people/mike-roberts) (180).
